LanguageData.MWR_ResonantWarmupStatDescription: This weapon's aiming time after resonance is applied.
LanguageData.MWR_DevGenerateResonanceDescription: Generate or reroll resonance on this item. Works only for Masterwork/Legendary weapons, apparel, or armor.
LanguageData.MWR_DevResonanceFailed: Resonance was not applied: the item must be Masterwork/Legendary and have at least one enabled resonance for this item type.
LanguageData.MWR_UnknownResonanceDescription: Unknown resonance. This item may have been created by an older version of the mod.
LanguageData.MWR_SettingsIntro: Masterwork Resonance roll settings. Existing resonant items keep their rolled values. These settings only affect future rolls.
LanguageData.MWR_SettingsMultiplayerNote: !!! Multiplayer note: every player should use the same settings to keep deterministic crafting rolls identical.
LanguageData.MWR_SettingsEnableDevModeEnchantmentTool: Adds a dev button to generate or reroll resonance on valid items. Works only while RimWorld Dev Mode is enabled.
LanguageData.MWR_SettingsEnabledTooltip: If disabled, this resonance will no longer roll on newly crafted items.
LanguageData.MWR_SettingsFeedbackText: Have an idea, balance suggestion, or bug report? Leave a comment on the Steam Workshop page.
LanguageData.MWR_SettingsRaiderGearQualityDescription: Optional experimental feature. Only hostile non-player combat pawns can have generated weapon and apparel quality upgraded. Disabled by default.
LanguageData.MWR_SettingsEnableRaiderGearQualityToolt: When enabled, hostile raiders can have generated weapons and apparel upgraded to Masterwork or Legendary quality. Traders, guests and allies are ignored.
LanguageData.MWR_SettingsRaiderResonanceDescription: Optional experimental feature. Only hostile non-player combat pawns can awaken resonance on generated Masterwork or Legendary weapons and apparel. Disabled by default.
LanguageData.MWR_SettingsEnableRaiderResonanceTooltip: When enabled, generated Masterwork or Legendary gear from hostile raiders can awaken resonance. Traders, guests and allies are ignored.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_MeleeCooldown_Description: Reduces the time between melee weapon attacks.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_MeleeMood_Description: While equipped, this weapon improves the wielder's mood.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_MeleeSkill_Description: While equipped, this weapon grants a flat bonus to melee hit chance.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_MeleeDodge_Description: While equipped, this weapon grants a flat bonus to melee dodge chance.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_RangedDamage_Description: Increases ranged weapon damage and armor penetration.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_RangedWarmup_Description: Reduces the time needed to prepare the weapon for firing.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_RangedMood_Description: While equipped, this weapon improves the wielder's mood.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_RangedSkill_Description: While equipped, this weapon grants a flat bonus to shooting accuracy.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_ApparelMoveSpeed_Description: While worn, this item increases the wearer's movement speed.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_ApparelDurability_Descriptio: Increases this item's maximum hit points.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_ApparelMood_Description: While worn, this item improves the wearer's mood.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_ApparelToughness_Description: While worn, this item reduces incoming damage.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_ApparelDodge_Description: While worn, this item grants a flat bonus to melee dodge chance.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_ApparelConsciousness_Descrip: Removed resonance. It no longer rolls and has no effect.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_ApparelPainReduction_Descrip: While worn, this item reduces the wearer's pain. Stacks with other items with this resonance up to 100%.
